Music Courses

To ensure the continuity of its activities and offer the opportunity to those who wish to begin or deepen the study of a musical instrument, the Società Filarmonica has for years organised music courses.

Students are guided in their preparation by qualified teachers. The Society has also established a collaboration with the Kindergarten and Primary School of Turriaco, to allow even the youngest children to approach the world of music.

Our Courses

From October to May, following the school calendar

🎵

Music Introduction

Introductory course for children from 5 years old. A first approach to music through play, rhythm, and singing. Ideal for discovering one's musical aptitudes.

🎺

Brass

Individual and group courses for trumpet, French horn, trombone, flugelhorn, euphonium, and tuba. For beginners and intermediate level.

🎷

Woodwinds

Courses for flute, clarinet, oboe, bassoon, and saxophone. Individual lessons with conservatory-graduated teachers.

🥁

Percussion

Drums, timpani, xylophone, and percussion instruments. Study of technique and band repertoire.

📖

Theory and Sight-Reading

Complementary course in music theory, score reading, and sight-reading for all instrumental students.

🎶

Ensemble Playing

Ensemble practice and preparation for joining the band. For students who have reached a sufficient level on their instrument.

Practical Information

📅 Period

October – May
Following the school calendar

👥 Participants

Open to all
Children, teenagers, and adults, beginners and beyond

📍 Venue

Society's premises
Turriaco (GO)

For information and enrolment:

Contact Us

Società Filarmonica di Turriaco

Founded in 1870, the Società Filarmonica di Turriaco is one of the most traditional wind bands in Friuli Venezia Giulia. Member of ANBIMA FVG.
